content:
Introductory Phrases

Introductory phrase ဆိုတာ sentence ရဲ့ အစမှာ လာတဲ့ phrase ဖြစ်ပါတယ်။ ဒါကို comma (,) နဲ့ ခြားပြီး main clause ကို ဆက်ရေးရပါတယ်။ Phrase ရဲ့ action ကို လုပ်သူဟာ main clause ရဲ့ subject နဲ့ တူရပါမယ်။

Structure/Formula: V-ing / V3 / To + V1 / After + V-ing , + Subject + Verb

👉 She was tired. She went to bed early. → Being tired, she went to bed early.

👉 The letter was written in English. It was hard to read. → Written in English, the letter was hard to read.

👉 He wanted to pass the exam. He studied very hard. → To pass the exam, he studied very hard.

👉 He finished his homework. He went out to play. → After finishing his homework, he went out to play.

🔑 Key Points:

  • Introductory phrase နောက်မှာ comma (,) အမြဲထားရမယ်
  • Phrase ရဲ့ doer ဟာ main clause ရဲ့ subject နဲ့ တူရမယ်
  • V-ing က active meaning အတွက်၊ V3 က passive meaning အတွက် သုံးတယ်
  • To + V1 က အကြောင်းပြချက် (purpose) ကို ပြတယ်

⚠️ Common Mistakes:

  • Comma မထားတာ - Walking to school he met a friend (မှား) → Walking to school, he met a friend (မှန်)
  • Dangling modifier - subject မတူတာ - Walking to school, the tree was beautiful (မှား)
